reviews.review_description: I wasted the 8 cents so you don’t have to. This “game” is just straight garbage. I don’t think it would even be a good mobile game if it was made for phones. It is a bunch of 2D assets with health bars just moving around the board attacking each other. Once you get to “manage” your resources, there is no real indication of what to do. Just shapes pop out and more 2D images. I’d request my 8 cents back if I didn’t want to limit myself on potential future returns. Certainly wouldn’t pay the $8 for this even if it was polished more for VR purposes.

developer_response.body: I just noticed you’re playing version 1.05. In that version, the opening is a scripted battle you can’t win. There’s indeed no guidance in that part, but the actual main game begins right after it ends. Considering your situation, that part has been removed
